fields.name: Superfood Acai & Quinoa Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense breakfast bowl featuring acai, cooked quinoa, toasted hemp seeds, and fresh blueberries.
fields.meal_suggestion: Layer cooked, chilled quinoa with an acai puree. Top with a generous handful of fresh blueberries, a tablespoon of hemp seeds, and a dollop of almond butter. Finish with a light drizzle of agave nectar if desired.
fields.nutrition_note: Acai and blueberries are rich in antioxidants; quinoa provides a complete plant-based protein and fiber; hemp seeds offer essential omega-3 fatty acids. This 'superfood' combination supports sustained energy and cognitive function.

output.reasoning: The user requested a superfood breakfast for Father on Day 3. Position -1 appends this new option to the existing 'Whole-Grain Pancakes' already present in the Day 3 Breakfast node.
